ideation: This animation sequence will portray a crab scuttling sideways.  The robot will mimic this movement by using both arms in a coordinated, alternating pattern.  The arms will move with a slight bend at the 'shoulder' to suggest leg-like motion.  We'll avoid sharp angles to maintain a fluid, natural feel. The crab's sideways movement will be simulated by a lateral shift of the arms, with alternating leading arms for each frame. The wrist position will remain relatively neutral to allow the arms to focus on the scuttling motion.

frames.beat: arms reach out sideways, ready to scuttle
the left arm leads, pushing the body right
the right arm leads, pushing the body left
